title: Crane's Advance Intelligence Wire
description: In the depot logbook, an incoming wire logged at 10:15 PM — before the red fire dispatch arrived — is recorded as a routine federal notification. But the logbook entry is in Harriet Voss's handwriting, and she has added a notation in the margin that reads only: CRANE ALREADY KNOWS ROUTE. The wire itself has been removed from the receiving tray, but the impression on the wax paper beneath it is still legible under oblique lamplight: it is a federal notification to all Erie corridor stations that a deputy marshal is operating in the area and that station personnel should cooperate with his inquiries.
